name: Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the beans and soak them overnight.
2. Drain the water and add 8 cups of cold water to the beans.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until the beans are tender.
4. Drain the beans and reserve the liquid.
5. In a crockpot, combine the drained beans, onion, and salt pork.
6. Add 1 cup of the reserved bean liquid, molasses, brown sugar, dry mustard, pepper, and salt.
7. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours or on high for 5-6 hours.
8. Stir before serving.
